Smart Rear View Mirror_V2

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DA6CF2
Recv ID: 18DAF26C
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 6C
Func Name: BEV - SRVM

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "1",
    "supplier": "A701      ",
    "soft": "00072000  ",
    "version": "00072000                        "
  }
]

    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "DTC_ECU_Voltage_Out_Of_Range"
